title: February 13th, 2022
body:
lyrics

adjacent to the argonauts
questing just to not get fleeced
chasing placement in a parking lot
cuz the gods don't lease to the unleashed
streets over policed
cuz that's how the beast eats
teeth all the way down
cuz the deeper it digs there's still more to be found
people to ground
a meet cuterie
assorted nuts
assaulted traumedy
beef preserved, cut, and served up beautifully
butchery honestly
between you and me
i won't eat if it means i gotta give up my odyssey

lyrics

caught em out there
saw em before they saw me
so now they're looking at me from down there
no sucker punches around here
i up jump the boogie
